element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Scattered throughout rooms for trap construction and weapon crafting
Primary threats requiring evasion and trap setup
Using household items as defensive tools against burglars
Encountered after item collection phase, before final boss
Final confrontation in basement after navigating hazards
Final goal after securing all family fortunes

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Two-phase structure: resource collection with evasion tension, followed by escalating late-game hazards and boss confrontation

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Expansive mansion layout with dedicated wings (toys, electronics, pets sections suggest optional exploration areas)
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Hidden developer messages embedded in rooms via jump/input combinations suggesting discoverable secrets

difficulty_curve.early_game: Tutorial-like introduction to platforming and item collection with minimal bandit pressure
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalating bandit encounters mixed with trap setup and resource gathering; evasion becomes primary challenge
difficulty_curve.late_game: Sharp difficulty spike: basement hazards (rats, bats, spiders, ghosts) followed by boss encounter with no escape option

notable_level_patterns.description: Mansion sections dedicated to specific item types (toys, electronics, pets) where Kevin gathers resources for traps while avoiding bandits
Horizontal platforming segments where Kevin must outrun or hide from Harry and Marv while moving toward objective areas
Multi-stage sequence introducing different creature hazards (rats, bats, spiders, ghosts) in escalating order before boss

sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Home Alone (SNES)
